briefdescription.para: Global array of DSI TX Subsystem sub-core instances.

detaileddescription.para: Each array element contains the driver instances for all sub-cores (DSI, MIPI TX PHY, DPHY) associated with an instance of the DSI TX Subsystem.

briefdescription.para: This function queries the subsystem instance configuration to determine the included sub-cores.

detaileddescription.para: For each sub-core that is present in the design the sub-core driver instance is binded with the subsystem sub-core driver handle

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the DSI sub-core initialization.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on DSI sub core initialization

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the MIPI DSI TX subsystem and included sub-cores.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the subsystem. Initialization includes setting up the instance data for top level as well as all included sub-core therein, and ensuring the hardware is in a known stable state

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
points to the configuration structure associated with the subsystem instance.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to configure the DSI default parameters that are to be handled by the application.

detaileddescription.para: It will configure protocol register with video mode, bllp mode,eotp

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful configuration of parameters

briefdescription.para: This function is used to activate the DSI Subsystem.

detaileddescription.para: Internally it activates the DPHY and DSI. Enable/Disable IP core to start processing

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is used to denote the subcore of subsystem
is used to denote whether to enable or disable the subsystem

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS is returned if subcore(DSI/DPHY) was successfully enabled or disabled XST_INVALID_PARAM is returned if subsystem core is not found

briefdescription.para: This function is used to reset the DSI Subsystem.

detaileddescription.para: Internally it resets the DPHY and DSI

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function reports list of cores included in DSI TX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI TX Subsystem instance.

listitem.para: This function sets the mode to send short packet.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsiTxSs instance to operate on
is the DSI mode (video or command) to operate on

listitem.para: This function will send the short packet to controller in command mode
Generic Short Packet Register and fill up the structure passed from caller.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsiTxSs instance to operate on

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE on failure in packet transmission

briefdescription.para: This function will send the short packet to controller Generic Short Packet Register and fill up the structure passed from caller.

detaileddescription.para: like to turn on/off peripheral, change color mode

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsiTxSs instance to operate on

briefdescription.para: This function will get the information from the GUI settings.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi instance to operate on

briefdescription.para: This function will get the information from the GUI settings.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsiTxss instance to operate on

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get pixel format.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DsiTxSs Instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: 0x0E – Packed RGB565 0x1E- packed RGB666 0x2E – Loosely packed RGB666 0x3E- Packed RGB888 0x0B- Compressed Pixel Stream

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get Command queue Vacancy.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSITxSs Instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Number of command queue entries can be safely written to Command queue FIFO, before it goes full.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDsiTxSs *InstancePtr, XDsi_VideoMode VideoMode, XVidC_VideoMode Resolution, u16 BurstPacketSize)
memberdef.name: XDsiTxSs_SetVideoInterfaceTiming

briefdescription.para: This function Set Timing mode and Resolution.

detaileddescription.para: As per user resolution selection it will get populate Periperal Timing Parameters from video common Library

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi instance to operate on
Specifies mode of Interfacing
sets the resolution
sets the packet size

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS is return Video interfacing set was successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM indicates an invalid parameter was specified.

briefdescription.para: This function Set Timning mode and Resolution as per user inputs.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi instance to operate on
Specifies mode of Interfacing
Video Timing parameters

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS is return Video interfacing was successfully set
XST_INVALID_PARAM indicates an invalid parameter was specified.
